prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built EA82T (turbocharged 1.8L flat-4, 120hp stock) with forged internals: Manley forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a Tomei 4-2-1 header and a HKS Hi-Power exhaust system with 80mm tips.

Fuel system upgrade: Replace the stock fuel pump with a Walbro 255 LPH in-tank pump, paired with 650cc DeatschWerks injectors. Use a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with a custom tune by a specialist like Subaru Performance Tuning (SPT) in Japan, targeting 280whp on E85 fuel with a 22psi boost limit.

Suspension and drivetrain: Install a Cusco Type RS 2-way LSD in the rear diff, paired with a reinforced transmission from a Subaru XT (4EAT auto or 5MT manual). Use Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for the Leone RX chassis) with polyurethane bushings from Whiteline (front control arms, rear trailing arms) and a Cusco front strut tower bar.
estetica: Body kit: Rare 1980s 'Leone RX Turbo' aero kit from C-West Japan, including front lip, side skirts, and a ducktail rear spoiler. Pair with a custom carbon fiber hood from Seibon Carbon with a functional scoop for the intercooler.

Wheels and stance: Work Meister S1 3-piece wheels (15x8 +15 front, 15x9 +20 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/50/15 rear). Fit a custom fender roll and pull with 15mm spacers in the rear for aggressive poke.

Interior and details: Full Recaro SRD bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, wrapped in custom Alcantara with red stitching. Replace the stock gauge cluster with a Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR) and add a Nardi Classic steering wheel with a quick-release hub. Finish with a custom roll cage from AutoPower Industries, bolt-in style with gusseted joints.
